detailed_description: This video showcases the elegant placement of a black 'Spartan Root Activator Shampoo' bottle onto a clean, minimalist shelf. A hand gently positions the pump-top bottle, highlighting its sleek design and branding against a backdrop of white and textured gray surfaces. The final shot frames the product in a pristine setting, emphasizing its premium aesthetic and readiness for use.

segments.why_kept: This segment is the semantic core as it effectively captures the precise moment of product interaction (placing the shampoo bottle) and culminates in a clear, sustained shot of the product in its intended setting. The earlier attempts at placing the bottle were trimmed as they represented calibration/mistakes, while this segment presents the final, successful action and the visual reveal of the product.
